# Image Upload Instructions

## Profile Picture
Upload your profile photo as: **`profile.jpg`**
- Recommended size: 400x400px or larger (square)
- Format: JPG, PNG, or WebP

## Gallery Images
Upload your gallery photos as:
- **`gallery1.jpg`**
- **`gallery2.jpg`**
- **`gallery3.jpg`**
- **`gallery4.jpg`**
- **`gallery5.jpg`**
- **`gallery6.jpg`**

Recommended size: 800x600px or larger
Format: JPG, PNG, or WebP

## How to Upload
1. Right-click on the `public/images/` folder in VS Code
2. Select "Upload..."
3. Choose your image files
4. Make sure the filenames match exactly (case-sensitive)

The images will automatically appear on the About page once uploaded!
